changes: Built `evals/external_holdout/` with schema, case manifests, required-sample gaps, and eval-overlap guards.
Added `evals/error_taxonomy/hard_case_manifest.json` plus auto-sync script seeded from historical review_queue failures.
Expanded semi-real hard-case variants with blur, JPEG blocking, border clipping, and stamp interference metadata.
Added report summarizer, latency measurer, protocol files, and SOTA comparison templates.
Tightened withholding signature-date parser prior so implausible region OCR cannot override a valid full-text date.

discarded: using `withholding_hana_payer_001` as a scored holdout case before fixing its source-path mismatch
using `withholding_pdf_001` as a scored holdout case before adding field labels

next_priorities: Label and isolate a true withholding external-holdout pair for `withholding_hana_payer_001` and `withholding_pdf_001` so mixed-language and PDF behavior can be scored outside internal eval.
Train and compare one recognizer candidate that consumes the new semi-real hard-case variants, then record field-group deltas into `evals/augmentation_effects/ledger.json`.
